candidates.why: Standard top-line revenue label; duplicated row but same label and values, using one instance is sufficient.
This is cost of sales, not revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Two identical 'Total Revenue' rows; selecting one is sufficient.

candidates.why: A component of COGS but not the full cost of sales; an aggregate COGS line exists and is preferable.
Another COGS-related component; however, an explicit total COGS line exists and is preferable.
Adjustment component to COGS, not the full COGS measure.
Specific direct costs but only a small component of overall COGS.
Explicit aggregate COGS line that consolidates cost of materials and inventory changes; best representation of total cost of sales.
Label suggests materials-related costs but appears unused (all nan) and less precise than the explicit COGS line.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement expense; not suitable for COGS.

variables.notes: Use the explicit consolidated COGS line rather than individual components.

candidates.why: Likely an operating overhead bucket; label suggests operating expenses rather than COGS or totals.
Classic SG&A-type overhead expense; clearly part of operating expenses and not a total line.
Another SG&A-type component; appears separate from COGS and not a total/subtotal.
Explicit selling expenses, which are part of SG&A overhead.
Appears to be operating income, not expense; should be excluded from SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selected all clear operating expense components (overhead) and excluded the income line.

candidates.why: Generic R&D label but appears with all nan in preview; a more explicit, populated R&D expense line exists.
Represents capitalized R&D, not the current-period expensed R&D; should not be primary XRD.
Explicit and populated R&D expense measure; best representation of total R&D expense for PROF.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not the core R&D spending itself.
Alternative R&D label but appears unused (nan); supplemental R&D expense line is clearer and populated.
Balance sheet asset from past R&D; not an income statement expense.
Balance sheet gross capitalized R&D asset.
Accumulated amortization of capitalized R&D; balance sheet item.
Balance sheet R&D asset net; not current expense.

variables.notes: Use the explicit R&D expense line; other R&D-related rows are capitalized amounts or amortization.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense but not the full amount.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Explicit main interest expense line (net of capitalized interest); best proxy for total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure for lease interest; subset of overall interest expense.
General label but appears unused (nan) vs. the populated 'Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest' line.
Interest income, not expense; not suitable for XINT.
Net interest measure; guideline prefers pure interest expense where available.
Interest income type; not an expense.
Equity measure, unrelated to interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Chosen as the primary interest expense measure; lease-related interest lines are components only.

candidates.why: Label suggests total equity, but values are blank in preview; a populated and clearer 'Total Equity' row exists.
Component of equity, not total book equity; subtotal not desired for BE.
Explicit total equity line with populated values; best representation of book equity/shareholders' equity.
Represents total equity including any minority interest; however, a pure 'Total Equity' line is available and preferable for BE.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Using the explicit populated Total Equity line as book equity.

candidates.why: Combined total equity plus minority interests; there is no separate minority interest line, so this cannot isolate MIB.

variables.notes: No standalone minority interest/non-controlling interests line is present; treat MIB as zero.
